steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to contrast the two samples: the 0.7 mm NiTi wire and the 2.2 mm natural rubber fiber. A contrasting statement must highlight a difference between them using specific data from the notes.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — The natural rubber sample used in the 2019 study was thicker than the single ply NiTi wire sample.: Directly contrasts the two samples using their differing thicknesses (2.2 mm vs 0.7 mm). ✓
  • Choice B — In 2019, researchers studied the effect of torsional heating on various fibers, including samples of natural rubber and single ply NiTi wire.: Mentions both samples but does not distinguish them — no contrast. ✗
  • Choice C — When the fibers were twisted as part of the 2019 study, the surface temperature of both samples increased.: Emphasizes a similarity (both increased), not a contrast. ✗
  • Choice D — Twisting an object will generally cause its temperature to increase, a process known as torsional heating.: Omits both samples entirely — no contrast. ✗
A is correct.
